files.notes: This file contains one poem 'Autumn' followed by three Guide Lessons for May covering different subjects. The lessons appear to be incomplete at the end, cutting off mid-sentence in Lesson 4 about Crime and Delinquency.

files.notes: The file contains the main article about Joseph Smith's life, followed by an advertisement for Beneficial Life Insurance Company with the title 'A Parent's Desire', and ends with a poem 'Pictures in the Fire'. The Joseph Smith article appears to be incomplete as it mentions 'Our second chapter will narrate further facts' but no second chapter follows.
